languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

languages.text: "Вам стоит привыкнуть к тому, что в Просторе Коронус есть много вещей, о которых неизвестно даже Вольным Торговцам и их свитам".
"You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."
languages.original_text: "Вам стоит привыкнуть к тому, что в Просторе Коронус есть много вещей, о которых неизвестно даже Вольным Торговцам и их свитам".

traits.locale_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."
"You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."
"You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

languages.text: 「コロナス・エクスパンスには、アウトロー・トレーダーでさえ知らないことがたくさんあることを、あなたは受け入れるべきだ」
languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

traits.locale_text: 「コロナス・エクスパンスには、アウトロー・トレーダーとその retinue でさえ知らないことがたくさんあることを、あなたは受け入れるべきだ」

languages.text: « Vous apprendrez qu'il y a beaucoup de choses dans les Étendues de Koronus que même les libres-marchands et leur entourage ne connaissent pas. »
languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

traits.locale_text: « Vous apprendrez qu'il y a beaucoup de choses dans les Étendues de Koronus que même les libres-marchands et leur entourage ne connaissent pas. »

languages.text: "Ihr müsst Euch an den Umstand gewöhnen, dass es in der Koronus-Ausdehnung viele Dinge gibt, die selbst den Freihändlern und ihren Gefolgschaften nicht bekannt sind."
languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst Euch an den Umstand gewöhnen, dass es in der Koronus-Ausdehnung viele Dinge gibt, die selbst den Freihändlern und ihren Gefolgschaften nicht bekannt sind."

languages.text: "Koronus Enginliği'nde Hür Tacirlerin bile bilmediği pek çok şey olduğu gerçeğine kendinizi alıştırmalısınız."
languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

traits.locale_text: "Koronus Enginliği'nde Hür Tacirlerin bile bilmediği pek çok şey olduğu gerçeğine kendinizi alıştırmalısınız."

languages.text: «Debe ir haciéndose a la idea de que hay muchas cosas en la Extensión de Koronus que son desconocidas incluso para los Comerciantes Independientes y sus séquitos».
languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

traits.locale_text: «Debe ir haciéndose a la idea de que hay muchas cosas en la Extensión de Koronus que son desconocidas incluso para los Comerciantes Independientes y sus séquitos».

languages.text: “你必须接受一个事实：科罗努斯扩区有太多事物，即便是行商浪人和他们的随从也不能尽知。”
languages.original_text: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."

traits.locale_text: “你必须接受一个事实：科罗努斯扩区有太多事物，即便是行商浪人和他们的随从也不能尽知。”
